title: Korean-Style Oat Noodle Stir Fry
description: A fusion of Korean and Chinese flavors in a hearty oat noodle stir fry. This dish combines the comforting texture of oat noodles with the bold flavors of Korean chili flakes and Chinese soy sauce.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they are tender and fragrant, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the coarsely ground oats and cook for an additional 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the kalguksu noodles, gentle (Korean chili flakes), and soy sauce to the skillet.
Stir-fry everything together for 2-3 minutes, until the noodles are well coated with the sauce.
Transfer the noodle mixture to a serving dish and garnish with chopped green onions and sesame seeds.
Optional: Add some kimchi on the side to add a bit of spice and crunch.
Note: You can adjust the amount of gentle (Korean chili flakes) to your desired level of spiciness.
